title: cyclosorus diminutus
intro: Cyclosorus diminutus, also known as the diminutive cyclosorus fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Himalayan region, for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus diminutus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Cyclosorus diminutus can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
